knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double wrap clearly visible
Single throw with appropriate hand switch from throw 1

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well closed with no visible gaps after knot tightening

technique_summary: Competent performance with proper surgeon's knot technique and appropriate hand switching between throws. Task completed within time limits with good knot security.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise suture placement to minimize deviation from marks
Consider slightly faster transitions between phases to improve overall time
strengths: Proper surgeon's knot formation with clear double wrap
Good knot security and drain closure
